title: Ethereum bull David Hoffman explains why he sold his ETH
summary: “Ethereum got the ETH price it deserves, and I don’t see ETH being rerated as an asset, higher or lower,” says David Hoffman.

title: Sharplink, Forward Industries among crypto firms considered for Russell indexes
summary: Bitmine and Galaxy Digital may also be eligible for the Russell 1000, an index tracking the largest 1,000 US companies that includes Nvidia, Microsoft and Apple.

title: Stocks Extend Highs on AI Optimism as Oil Slides: Markets Wrap
summary: The rally in US stocks is set to stretch into a fifth day as optimism around artificial intelligence, lower oil prices and easing bond yields spurred traders to grow increasingly bullish.

title: SK Hynix Joins $1 Trillion Club Amid AI Frenzy
summary: South Korea’s SK Hynix became just the third Asian company to join the $1 trillion club as a breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks and an AI frenzy reshapes economies worldwide. (Source: Bloomberg)
